text: Here's what science actually says about insulin resistance. Insulin resistance is when your cells stop responding to insulin effectively. This can lead to high blood sugar. But it’s not just about sugar. It can affect your energy, mood, and even weight gain. Studies show that lifestyle changes can improve insulin sensitivity. Exercise and diet are key. Understanding this can help you take control of your health. Are you ready to make a change? Follow for more science-backed health insights!
